issues.title: design: product + UX/UI spec for fitness site v2 (mobile-first gym companion)
issues.summary: PM + UX + UI spec for the site as a phone-first gym companion: Today/Week/Stats screens, bottom tab bar, chalk-proof controls, static-plan fallback. Four docs in docs/design/site-v2/. PR #31 awaits Shaked's approval.
issues.agents: general agent (opus) → org-kanban:reviewer → Shaked approval gate

issues.title: feat(infra): Tailscale serving — multi-project path convention + Shaked-only write auth
issues.summary: One shared tailnet host: every project owns HOST/<project>/, root reserved, never Funnel. Caddy now binds 127.0.0.1 only. Write endpoints require Tailscale identity == Shaked; localhost bypass reserved for the bot. Doc half merged (PR #30); auth middleware lands with #16.

issues.title: docs(tracking): import real training history from coach spreadsheet (Cycles 1–2) + reset baselines
issues.summary: The real coach-spreadsheet program (2 cycles, 10 weeks, 6 days/week) transcribed into tracking/history/ with every logged result, and athlete-profile.md benchmarks reset to reality (+40kg chin-up, +22.5kg hang, OAP at −7.5kg). Merged as PR #32.

issues.title: feat: highlight current training day in site UI
issues.summary: The plan page marks today's session and scrolls to it on mobile, driven by trainingDayKeywords in config.json. Already live.

issues.title: feat(site): living roadmap UI — ticket dependency graph with per-ticket visual mocks
issues.summary: This page. A dependency graph of all tickets, rebuilt from tickets.json on every site build; clicking a ticket shows a working mock of its deliverable. sync-tickets.mjs refreshes live status from GitHub.

issues.title: feat: add SQLite-backed Node server for fitness site state
issues.summary: A small Node server owning site/data/training.db: migrations framework, /fitness/api/* namespace, Tailscale write-auth middleware (the #26 enforcement), nightly backups. Caddy reverse-proxies to it. Foundation for Done button, stats, Telegram, and the data pipeline.

issues.title: feat(plan): rebuild PLAN.md as the next training cycle, reconciled with the real spreadsheet program
issues.summary: Rewrite PLAN.md as the next cycle seeded from real end-state numbers. BLOCKED on Shaked's three gates: days/week (profile says 4–5, reality was 6), planche priority, and who programs going forward (coach vs this repo).

issues.title: docs(knowledge): sync exercise-library.md with every real exercise + verified videos
issues.summary: Every exercise from the real program (~35: cossack squat, skin the cat, spray wall, chin-up iso…) documented with cues, progressions, and a verified video link with title, grouped by movement pattern.

issues.title: feat(site): implement site v2 UI from the approved design spec
issues.summary: Implements the approved wireframes: Today/Week/Stats with a bottom tab bar, the Done button and streak calendar in their final visual form, static read-only fallback when the server is down. Vanilla JS on the existing build pipeline.

issues.title: feat: add Done button to mark today's training as complete
issues.summary: One tap records today as trained (SQLite, idempotent, survives refresh). POST /fitness/api/done + GET /fitness/api/done/today. The same endpoint later serves the Telegram /done command.

issues.title: docs(physio): shoulder-safety audit of the new cycle + prehab block refresh
issues.summary: Exercise-by-exercise anterior-shoulder risk rating (green/yellow/red) of the rebuilt plan, refreshed prehab block, and a hard progression gate: never advance flagged loads while shoulder pain trends up.

issues.title: feat: add /stats page showing training adherence history
issues.summary: Adherence from the sessions table: current/longest streak, week/month rates, and a 30-day calendar where rest days are neutral and only scheduled days can be 'missed'. SSR page + JSON endpoint for Telegram. Merged PR #44.

issues.title: feat(data): processing pipeline — reconcile SQLite runtime state with tracking/ markdown
issues.summary: The contract between the two stores: markdown owns the program + curated history, SQLite owns runtime capture. An export script turns DB rows into tracking/week-*.md via an agent-reviewed PR; a backfill script loads spreadsheet-era history into the DB for stats.

issues.title: feat(telegram): Shaked-only Telegram bot for plan, done-marking, and quick logging
issues.summary: Off-tailnet access from anywhere: /today, /done, /week, /stats, /log. Long-polling from the laptop (nothing exposed to the internet), hard allowlist of one Telegram user ID, silence to everyone else, every command audit-logged. Code shipped; activation gated on Shaked's .env (BotFather token + owner ID).

issues.title: refactor(site): migrate better-sqlite3 → built-in node:sqlite
issues.summary: Remove the only native dependency: the #36 deploy broke twice on Node-ABI drift (PRs #37/#38). node:sqlite (built into Node ≥22.5) is verified working on the service Node and maps 1:1 to the current driver usage.
